items.title: All Items
items.subtitle: Your saved logins and secrets, end-to-end encrypted.

empty.title: No items yet
empty.subtitle: Create your first item to get started.

trashConfirm.title: Move to trash
trashConfirm.message: Move "{{name}}" to trash? You can restore it later from Trash.

createVault.title: New vault
createVault.noOrgsHint: Join or create an organization to make a shared vault.
createVault.orgRequired: Choose an organization for the shared vault.

deleteVault.description: Permanently delete this vault with every item, folder, and attachment in it. This cannot be undone.
deleteVault.lastVaultHint: This is your only vault. Create another vault before deleting this one.
deleteVault.title: Delete vault?
deleteVault.warning: This permanently deletes "{{name}}" and everything in it - items, folders, attachments, and member access. There is no trash for vaults and no way back.

editor.decryptErrorHint: This item's name could not be decrypted
editor.saveDisabledDecryptFailed: Saving is disabled to protect the original name

purgeConfirm.title: Delete permanently
purgeConfirm.message: Permanently delete "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone, and you will be asked for your master password.

reprompt.title: Master Password Required
reprompt.subtitle: This item requires your master password to reveal secrets.

passwordGenerator.noClassSelected: Select at least one character set to generate a password.

safetyNumber.label: Safety Number
safetyNumber.description: Verify this number out-of-band to confirm identity key authenticity.

export.heading: Export
export.description: Download an encrypted, signed backup of every vault you can access. The file is useless without your master password - item contents stay encrypted. Re-importing on the same account restores any items you later delete.
export.signedNote: Signed with your identity key (Ed25519). Any byte-level tampering before re-import will fail signature verification and the import will refuse to run.
export.unknownError: Export failed for an unknown reason
export.csvWarning: A CSV export is NOT encrypted - every password is written in plain text. Store it somewhere safe and delete it once you are done.
export.noItems: There are no items to export.

totp.label: One-time code
totp.invalid: Stored value is not a valid TOTP secret

import.heading: Import
import.description: Import items from a password manager export. All data is encrypted client-side before being sent to the server.

restore.heading: Restore encrypted backup
restore.description: Upload a vaultctl encrypted backup file (from the Export section above). Signature is verified against your identity key before any data is sent to the server. Items are restored into their original vaults - vaults that no longer exist on this account are skipped.
restore.tamperNote: Tampered, cross-account, or foreign-format files are rejected before any network call.
restore.identityKeyUnavailable: Identity public key unavailable - sign in again and retry
restore.readFailed: Could not read the selected file

errors.signature: Signature verification failed - the file was modified or corrupted. Do NOT trust its contents.
errors.userMismatch: This backup belongs to a different account and cannot be restored here.
errors.version: {{message}}. Upgrade vaultctl to a newer version.

sharing.heading: Sharing
sharing.personalVaultNote: This is a personal vault. To share items with others, create a shared vault and move items into it.
sharing.errorNoOrg: This vault is not linked to an organization.
sharing.errorPubkeyFetch: Could not fetch the recipient's public key. Check the user ID.
sharing.errorShare: Could not share the vault. Please try again.

attachments.heading: Attachments
attachments.empty: No attachments. Files are encrypted in your browser before upload.

customFields.heading: Custom fields
customFields.empty: No custom fields. Add one to store extra metadata like security questions, recovery codes, or arbitrary key-value pairs.
